key_items: Bitcoin rally to $70K builds as orderbook structure highlights traders' confidence with positive bid-ask readings and bullish RSI divergence
SpaceX officially joins public Bitcoin leaderboard as 8th largest holder with 18,712 BTC, signaling major institutional conviction
Standard Chartered calls crypto bottom as Bitcoin recovers from $59,000 low, suggesting cycle low is likely in
reasoning: Multiple institutional accumulation signals (SpaceX's 18.7k BTC, Metaplanet's ecosystem expansion, Standard Chartered cycle bottom call) combined with strong technical bullish setup ($70K target, positive orderbook structure, RSI divergence) indicate rising institutional conviction and reduced downside risk. Regulatory headwinds (Anthropic AI restrictions, SBF appeal loss) are manageable and crypto-specific rather than systemic to Bitcoin fundamentals.
risks: Major buyer conviction loss among ETFs and public company treasuries could trigger sharp liquidation cascade if $70K resistance fails and technical setup breaks down.
